summary: Final docs gate for collections-are-data. Added three new sections to type-system.md (dict/list native types, Compare mediator, IListLeaf/chunk-row model), one to wire-serialization.md (@schema:data marker), updated the good_to_know.md index with four new entries, and filed a CLAUDE.md proposal for three new cross-cutting pattern bullets. No C# docstring drift — changed files carried fresh, accurate comments from the coder. Merge gate carries from security + auditor: hold behind signature-as-schema-wrapper.

changes.description: dict.@this and list.@this — native PLang collection types: symmetric peers, end-to-end Data, [JsonConverter] governs raw-STJ only, ToRaw() is read-out form.
Compare — single typed-compare mediator: null policy, coercion, IEquatableValue/IOrderableValue dispatch, ScalarComparer (one legal type-switch), NotOrderableException, footgun warning.
List chunk/row model and IListLeaf: rows-under-the-hood + flat-on-read, O(1) Add, IListLeaf = dissolve-into-list (value-owned, no type-switch), CopyStructure aliasing prevention.
@schema:"data" marker — canonical Data recognizer on the wire: two write paths, three read paths, depth-capped, name excluded from signing.
Four new pointer entries for the new type-system.md and wire-serialization.md sections.
Three new CLAUDE.md bullets: IEquatableValue/IOrderableValue/Compare mediator, native collection types (dict/list), IListLeaf/CopyStructure.
